results.name: karn (planet)
results.description: Neighboring planet to Gallifrey. Absolutely no relation to the silver golem planeswalker of the same name.

results.name: karnstructs
results.description: Cards that make the same construct tokens as Karn, Scion of Urza.

results.name: kasa
results.description: A broad, conical or dome-shaped traditional Japanese hat usually made out of straw or metal.

results.name: kav
results.description: A species of sentient kavus from the Sothera system.

results.name: kavaron
results.description: One of Sothera's second twin planets, crumbling home of the Kav.

results.name: kavu
results.description: A sturdy lizardlike beast found around the multiverse

results.name: keikogi
results.description: A standard variety of uniform for martial arts practitioners, consisting of loose trousers and shirt and a belt.

results.name: keldon
results.description: Grey-skinned peoples of the nation of Keld on Dominaria.

results.name: kemonomimi
results.description: Human(-like) characters with animal features, mainly ears and tails. Not anthropomorphic animals, but mostly human albeit with animal features.

results.name: kenku
results.description: Crow people, from Dungeons and Dragons

results.name: kequia akosa
results.description: An interplanar exchange student at Strixhaven, and the granddaughter of the famous planeswalker Teferi.

results.name: ketria
results.description:
The green-blue-red-aligned triome on Ikoria.
Rivers and waterfalls that wind through crystalline forests and cascade down mountain sides.

results.name: key
results.description: An object with a specific physical configuration to allow its insertion-into and operation-of a device (commonly a lock) anticipating that configuration. 🔑

results.name: key art
results.description: Art that has been used for promotional and advertising purposes, such as being on booster packs, product boxes, and so on.

results.name: key art (booster box)
results.description: Art that was used to decorate a set's booster box

results.name: key art (booster pack)
results.description: These card arts were used to decorate the booster packs of one or more sets.
